LIMIT_MESSAGES.CONVERSATION: You have exceeded the conversation limit. Hacker plan allows only 500 conversations.
LIMIT_MESSAGES.INBOXES: You have exceeded the inbox limit. Hacker plan only supports website live-chat. Additional inboxes like email, WhatsApp etc. require a paid plan.
LIMIT_MESSAGES.AGENTS: You have exceeded the agent limit. Your plan only allows {allowedAgents} agents.
LIMIT_MESSAGES.NON_ADMIN: Please contact your administrator to upgrade the plan and continue using all features.

GENERAL_SETTINGS.TITLE: アカウント設定

UPDATE.ERROR: 設定を更新できませんでした。もう一度お試しください
UPDATE.SUCCESS: 正常にアカウント設定を更新しました

FORM.ERROR: 正しくフォームに入力してください

ACCOUNT_ID.TITLE: アカウントID
ACCOUNT_ID.NOTE: APIベースの統合を構築する場合に必要なIDです

AUTO_RESOLVE.TITLE: Auto-resolve conversations
AUTO_RESOLVE.NOTE: This configuration would allow you to automatically resolve the conversation after a certain period of inactivity.

DURATION.LABEL: Inactivity duration
DURATION.HELP: Time period of inactivity after which conversation is auto-resolved
DURATION.ERROR: Auto resolve duration should be between 10 minutes and 999 days

API.ERROR: Failed to update auto resolve settings

MESSAGE.LABEL: Custom auto-resolution message
MESSAGE.PLACEHOLDER: Conversation was marked resolved by system due to 15 days of inactivity
MESSAGE.HELP: Message sent to the customer after conversation is auto-resolved

IGNORE_WAITING.LABEL: Skip conversations waiting for agent’s reply

NAME.LABEL: アカウント名
NAME.PLACEHOLDER: あなたのアカウント名
NAME.ERROR: 正しいアカウント名を入力してください

LANGUAGE.LABEL: Site language
LANGUAGE.PLACEHOLDER: あなたのアカウント名

DOMAIN.LABEL: 受信メールドメイン
DOMAIN.PLACEHOLDER: メールを受信するドメイン

SUPPORT_EMAIL.LABEL: サポートメール
SUPPORT_EMAIL.PLACEHOLDER: あなたの会社のサポートメール

AUTO_RESOLVE_IGNORE_WAITING.LABEL: Exclude unattended conversations
AUTO_RESOLVE_IGNORE_WAITING.HELP: When enabled, the system will skip resolving conversations that are still waiting for an agent's reply.

AUDIO_TRANSCRIPTION.TITLE: Transcribe Audio Messages
AUDIO_TRANSCRIPTION.NOTE: Automatically transcribe audio messages in conversations. Generate a text transcript whenever an audio message is sent or received, and display it alongside the message.

API.ERROR: Failed to update audio transcription setting

AUTO_RESOLVE_DURATION.LABEL: Number of days after a ticket should auto resolve if there is no activity
AUTO_RESOLVE_DURATION.ERROR: Please enter a valid auto resolve duration (minimum 1 day and maximum 999 days)

FEATURES.INBOUND_EMAIL_ENABLED: あなたのアカウントでは、メールでの会話が継続できるようになっています。
FEATURES.CUSTOM_EMAIL_DOMAIN_ENABLED: カスタムドメインでメールを受信できるようになりました。

GENERAL_SETTINGS.PAYMENT_PENDING: Your payment is pending. Please update your payment information to continue using Software Arrows
